feedItems.description: allocated £1.8m to Planning & Development (≈£25 per resident)
allocated £2.0m to Culture & Leisure (≈£28 per resident)
allocated £7.6m to Environment & Streets (≈£106 per resident)
allocated £2.7m to Council Running Costs (≈£39 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £72 (3.3%) to £2237
